stories.headline: BlackRock IBIT Options Top Deribit, Marking Wall Street's Crypto Derivatives Takeover
stories.tldr: BlackRock's IBIT bitcoin ETF options surpassed Deribit in open interest, signaling regulated U.S. derivatives are eclipsing offshore venues for institutional hedging.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: For the first time, the deepest bitcoin options liquidity sits inside a U.S.-regulated wrapper, accelerating Wall Street's grip on price discovery.
the_details: IBIT options open interest passed Deribit's on Friday April 24, per CoinDesk reporting.
Launched in late 2024, IBIT now hosts the largest bitcoin options book on a regulated U.S. venue.
Institutions are leaning on IBIT puts to hedge macro shocks like the recent Iran ceasefire wobble.

stories.headline: Bitcoin Eyes Best Month in a Year as USDT Supply Pumps $5B Toward $150B Record
stories.tldr: BTC trades above $77,000 and is up over 13% in April, fueled by Tether's USDT supply expanding nearly $5B toward a record $150B mark.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: Stablecoin issuance is the cleanest leading indicator of crypto liquidity — and right now it is unambiguously bullish.
the_details: BTC is up roughly 13% month-to-date, on pace for its strongest month since spring 2025.
USDT circulating supply grew about $5B in 30 days, nearing the unprecedented $150B level.
Spot BTC ETFs absorbed $2B over 8 sessions through April 24, extending an inflow streak.

stories.headline: Aave Rallies DeFi Heavyweights to Contain $292M KelpDAO Hack Contagion
stories.tldr: Aave is coordinating a multi-protocol response to the $292M KelpDAO exploit after $8.45B in deposits fled the lender in 48 hours.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: A coordinated DeFi bailout signals the sector is treating systemic cross-chain risk as an industry problem, not a single-protocol failure.
the_details: Attacker drained 116,500 rsETH (~$292M) via misconfigured LayerZero bridge config on April 19.
Aave saw $8.45B in deposit outflows and broader DeFi TVL fell about $13B over two days.
Aave-led working group is coordinating with bridge providers and rsETH holders on remediation.

stories.headline: Spot Solana ETFs Cross $1B AUM as Five Straight Weeks of Inflows Pile Up
stories.tldr: Spot SOL ETFs surpassed $1B in assets under management with $35.17M of net inflows over the past week across five straight positive sessions.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: SOL is the first non-BTC/ETH spot ETF cohort to clear a billion in AUM, validating altcoin ETF demand for issuers eyeing XRP and DOGE products.
the_details: Combined Solana ETF AUM crossed the $1B milestone this week per fund tracking data.
Net inflows hit $35.17M over the past week across five consecutive positive sessions.
Goldman Sachs disclosed a major position in the Solana ETF complex this cycle.

stories.headline: Senate Crypto Bill Nears Stablecoin Rewards Deal as Bank Lobby Digs In
stories.tldr: Sens. Alsobrooks and Tillis are closing in on stablecoin rewards language for the market structure bill, a key sticking point that has stalled passage.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: Resolving stablecoin rewards unlocks the broader Clarity Act — without it, U.S. crypto market structure law slips into 2027.
the_details: Negotiators say talks are in a 'good spot' but ethics concerns over Trump conflicts loom.
Banks oppose the provision, warning yield-bearing stablecoins will siphon community deposits.
April markup is off the table; a May Senate Banking Committee hearing is the next window.
